overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a covered commercial plaza through corridors with digital floor advertisements, under an overpass, and past modern buildings with water features.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered plaza surrounded by glowing neon advertisement pillars and digital billboards

entered.detail: tall rectangular pillar wrapped in glowing purple and cyan neon advertisements
futuristic fuel station with purple neon signage and pump displays
illuminated escalator with yellow lighting leading to upper level
cyan and purple neon strips running along the ceiling of the covered plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial plaza bathed in neon light. The player walks forward through the space, passing tall advertisement pillars and a fuel station on the left, with an escalator structure visible to the right. The environment is devoid of pedestrians, creating an atmospheric, empty cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with digital floor advertisements under overpass

events.description: exits covered plaza into narrow corridor with illuminated floor panels and yellow overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with glowing digital advertisements embedded in the floor panels

entered.detail: large structural overpass with distinctive yellow and black striped pattern running along the right side
floor panels displaying glowing digital advertisements and brand logos
row of futuristic vending machines with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open plaza into a narrow corridor characterized by a massive yellow and black striped overpass structure on the right. The floor features illuminated digital advertisement panels that glow beneath the player's feet as they walk forward through the enclosed space.

events.description: exits enclosed corridor into open street underpass with traffic infrastructure
approaches traffic light showing red signal at crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and crossing the city street, navigating around traffic lights

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with glowing elements driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
tall street lamp casting bright white light onto the road
yellow and white painted lines marking lanes and crosswalk boundaries
concrete underside of the overpass creating a covered tunnel effect

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the player enters an urban underpass beneath the overpass structure. The scene features traffic infrastructure including a red traffic light and street lamps. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the left as the player approaches and crosses the asphalt street, transitioning from the enclosed corridor to the open road environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern building exterior with geometric water features

events.description: crosses street and enters area with modern architecture and reflective water features

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beside a modern building with geometric water features and concrete sculptures

entered.detail: large contemporary building with dark concrete facade and geometric architectural elements
reflective pools of water with floating geometric concrete blocks and subtle lighting
distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a modern architectural zone featuring a large concrete building on the left and an artistic water feature with geometric blocks on the right. The player walks along the sidewalk past the reflective pools, with the distant city skyline and illuminated skyscrapers visible ahead, concluding the journey through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered commercial plaza into the open urban sprawl. It begins in a vacant, covered plaza filled with towering advertisement pillars and a fuel station, moving forward past an escalator structure in an atmospheric, empty setting. As the camera advances, the space narrows into a corridor dominated by a massive yellow and black striped overpass, where illuminated digital panels glow beneath the player's feet. The scene then opens into an urban underpass, crossing an asphalt street past a red traffic light and a passing futuristic vehicle before emerging from the enclosure. Finally, the path leads along a modern architectural zone featuring a concrete building and geometric water features, ending with a view of the illuminated skyscrapers of the distant city skyline.
